label: Databases & information retrieval

node.label: Databases & information retrieval
node.definition: Storage, indexing, ranking, query processing, and transactions make external knowledge accessible at scale.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Databases & information retrieval is modeled as depending on Algorithms & data structures, Statistics & experimental design and feeding downstream nodes such as Datasets, sampling & splits, Knowledge graphs, ontologies & schemas, External retrieval & ranking.
examples: atlas downstream link to Datasets, sampling & splits
atlas downstream link to Knowledge graphs, ontologies & schemas
atlas downstream link to External retrieval & ranking
limitations: Its abstractions require explicit assumptions; a mathematically valid result can still be irrelevant to a mismatched empirical setting. Its direct dependencies include Algorithms & data structures, Statistics & experimental design.

dependencies.rationale: Databases & information retrieval rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Algorithms & data structures.
In this atlas graph, Databases & information retrieval has a `requires` dependency on Statistics & experimental design with `common` strength.
